post.description: Creates an integration-level action (workspace-wide) or a connection-level action instance when `connectionId` is provided. Supports intent-based creation: include an `intent` field to launch an action-building agent.

uuid.description: Stable unique identifier (UUID). Can be provided on create; otherwise generated. Must be unique across elements of this type.

key.description: Stable key for referencing the element (e.g. in selectors). Unique per (parent, integration) scope. Generated from name if not provided on create.

name.description: Display name. Optional on create; used to generate key when key is omitted.

integrationId.description: Internal ID of the integration this element belongs to. Omit for universal elements; set for integration-specific elements. Uniqueness of key is scoped per integration.

integrationUuid.description: UUID of the integration; alternative to integrationId when creating from export. Resolved to integrationId by the API.

integrationKey.description: Key of the integration; alternative to integrationId. Resolved to integrationId by the API.

parentId.description: Internal ID of the parent workspace element. Used for hierarchy (e.g. integration-level under universal). Child key uniqueness is scoped by parent and integration.

parentUuid.description: UUID of the parent element; alternative to parentId when creating (e.g. from export). Resolved to parentId by the API.

parentKey.description: Key of the parent element; alternative to parentId. Resolved to parentId by the API.

connectionId.description: Connection ID for filtering or for connection-level instances. Same semantics as base integration-level property.

instanceKey.description: Key for the connection-level instance when multiple exist per connection. Same semantics as base integration-level property.

isUniversal.description: When true, the element is universal (shared across all integrations). Requires universal-element access. Omit or false for integration-specific elements.

externalAppId.description: Internal ID of the external app this element belongs to. Auto-populated from the integration when integrationId is set and the integration has an externalAppId.

externalAppUuid.description: UUID of the external app; alternative to externalAppId when creating from export. Resolved to externalAppId by the API.

externalAppKey.description: Key of the external app; alternative to externalAppId. Resolved to externalAppId by the API.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the action input. Used by the action engine for template output schema, run-time variables, and output mapping.

type.description: Action type (e.g. ConnectorOperation, RunJavascript). Determines which handler runs and which config schema is used for validation.

config.description: Type-specific configuration object. Validated by the handler's config schema; passed to handler setup/run and getTemplateOutputSchema.

outputMapping.description: Mapping expression to transform the action's raw output. Evaluated with access to input, output, and user; used to compute transformed output schema and at run time.

customOutputSchema.description: Explicit output schema for the action. Takes precedence over the transformed or default output schema when resolving outputSchema.

intent.description: [Experimental] Intent-based instruction for an agent to configure this element.

id.description: Internal database ID of the element. Assigned by the API; unique per element.

name.description: Display name. Always present in API responses (filled by API if not set on create).

uuid.description: Stable unique identifier (UUID). Can be provided on create; otherwise generated. Must be unique across elements of this type.

key.description: Stable key for referencing the element (e.g. in selectors). Unique per (parent, integration) scope. Generated from name if not provided on create.

state.description: Current lifecycle or health state (e.g. READY, SETUP_FAILED, CONFIGURATION_ERROR, BUILDING). Set by the engine during setup and validation.

errors.description: Validation or setup errors when state is not READY.

revision.description: Opaque revision token; changes on each update. Used for optimistic concurrency.

createdAt.description: ISO date when the element was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO date when the element was last updated.

archivedAt.description: When set, the element is archived (soft-deleted). Archived elements cannot be patched.

isDeactivated.description: When true, setup is skipped and the element is treated as inactive (e.g. when dependencies are deactivated or the element is archived).

isReadOnly.description: When true, the element cannot be modified (e.g. published package elements or elements from another workspace).

integrationId.description: Internal ID of the integration this element belongs to. Omit for universal elements; set for integration-specific elements. Uniqueness of key is scoped per integration.

integrationUuid.description: UUID of the integration; alternative to integrationId when creating from export. Resolved to integrationId by the API.

integrationKey.description: Key of the integration; alternative to integrationId. Resolved to integrationId by the API.

parentId.description: Internal ID of the parent workspace element. Used for hierarchy (e.g. integration-level under universal). Child key uniqueness is scoped by parent and integration.

parentUuid.description: UUID of the parent element; alternative to parentId when creating (e.g. from export). Resolved to parentId by the API.

parentKey.description: Key of the parent element; alternative to parentId. Resolved to parentId by the API.

connectionId.description: Connection ID for filtering or for connection-level instances. Same semantics as base integration-level property.

instanceKey.description: Key for the connection-level instance when multiple exist per connection. Same semantics as base integration-level property.

isUniversal.description: When true, the element is universal (shared across all integrations). Requires universal-element access. Omit or false for integration-specific elements.

externalAppId.description: Internal ID of the external app this element belongs to. Auto-populated from the integration when integrationId is set and the integration has an externalAppId.

externalAppUuid.description: UUID of the external app when this action is published in a package that has an external app. Populated in API responses for published actions.

externalAppKey.description: Key of the external app; alternative to externalAppId. Resolved to externalAppId by the API.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the action input. Used by the action engine for template output schema, run-time variables, and output mapping.

type.description: Action type (e.g. ConnectorOperation, RunJavascript). Determines which handler runs and which config schema is used for validation.

config.description: Type-specific configuration object. Validated by the handler's config schema; passed to handler setup/run and getTemplateOutputSchema.

outputMapping.description: Mapping expression to transform the action's raw output. Evaluated with access to input, output, and user; used to compute transformed output schema and at run time.

customOutputSchema.description: Explicit output schema for the action. Takes precedence over the transformed or default output schema when resolving outputSchema.

universalParentId.description: For connection-level instances: ID of the universal (root) action in the hierarchy. Set automatically when creating an instance; used in list/selector queries to filter by universal parent.

isPublic.description: When true, the element is publicly listed (e.g. in universe). Used for published packages; publish/unpublish updates this on published elements.

id.description: Internal database ID of the element. Assigned by the API; unique per element.

name.description: Display name. Always present in API responses (filled by API if not set on create).

uuid.description: Stable unique identifier (UUID). Can be provided on create; otherwise generated. Must be unique across elements of this type.

key.description: Stable key for referencing the element (e.g. in selectors). Unique per (parent, integration) scope. Generated from name if not provided on create.

state.description: Current lifecycle or health state (e.g. READY, SETUP_FAILED, CONFIGURATION_ERROR, BUILDING). Set by the engine during setup and validation.

errors.description: Validation or setup errors when state is not READY.

revision.description: Opaque revision token; changes on each update. Used for optimistic concurrency.

createdAt.description: ISO date when the element was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO date when the element was last updated.

isReadOnly.description: When true, the element cannot be modified (e.g. published package elements or elements from another workspace).
